description: MCP server for KnowBe4 security awareness training — users, groups, training, phishing campaigns.
name: io.github.wyre-technology/knowbe4-mcp

environmentVariables.description: KnowBe4 Reporting API token (Bearer token from KnowBe4 console)
environmentVariables.name: KNOWBE4_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: KnowBe4 region: 'us', 'eu', 'ca', 'uk', or 'de' — selects API base URL
environmentVariables.name: KNOWBE4_REGION

environmentVariables.description: Override the KnowBe4 API base URL — auto-derived from region if omitted
environmentVariables.name: KNOWBE4_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Transport mode for the server. Set to 'stdio' for local CLI use; the image defaults to 'http' for gateway hosting.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_TRANSPORT

environmentVariables.description: Credential source: 'env' reads vars locally, 'gateway' expects header injection from the WYRE MCP Gateway.
environmentVariables.name: AUTH_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Log verbosity: debug, info, warn, error
environmentVariables.name: LOG_LEVEL

title: KnowBe4
